FALS Hernia (Fellowship in Advanced Laparoscopic Surgery - Hernia Surgery) from Indian Association of Gastrointestinal and Endo-surgeons (IAGES), December 2021; FALS Robotics (Fellowship in Advanced Laparoscopic Surgery - Robotic Surgery) from Indian Association of Gastrointestinal and Endo-surgeons (IAGES), December 2021
